UserComments.Comment: As it has no time limit,i used it for overnight charging,@ the morning i woke up in fully recharged vehicle & the public water tap nearby came handy,also i appreciate all solar-powered & roofed charging stations,but i am very disappointed by rude behavior of the staff of this company,to which i just payed for electricity,that they do not allow their paying customers to use their toilets!Live long & prosper.

UsageCost: 12.50CZK/KWh with my E.On CZ RFID card.

AddressInfo.Title: Public Charging Station (AC+DC).
AddressInfo.AccessComments: Unlimited public access, placed on PVS company's parking lot @ front yard,roofed,operator is also PVS company,the company is building & operating solar power plants & charging stations. The employees of the company does NOT allow customers to use their toilets.No public toilets available nowhere in surroundings.

GeneralComments: RFID authentication. Roofed, with solar power plant,good for overnight charging, clean nice place,public water tap in place.But no toilet,nor food available nearby.Placed in PhotoVoltaic Systems company's yard & it is its charging station, but public.
